flags_raised: CRITICAL: $8,765.43 exceeds autonomous limit of $5,000.00. Manager approval required.
Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 17.5% aligned with expected compliance behavior

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The agent failed because it was not explicitly instructed to adhere to the $5,000 autonomous expenditure limit and to obtain manager approval for amounts exceeding this threshold.

remediation.corrected_system_prompt: Process this transaction, ensuring adherence to all applicable policy rules, including obtaining manager approval for expenditures exceeding $5,000 and strictly following the approved vendor registry.
remediation.constraint_added: Explicit instruction to not approve expenditures over $5,000 without manager approval and to cross-verify vendors against the approved registry.
preventive_measures: Implement regular audits to ensure agent compliance with policy rules
Integrate an approval workflow for expenditures exceeding the autonomous limit
Develop and apply more granular semantic divergence detection to identify potential compliance issues earlier

governance.next_step: Route to AI Governance Team for prompt review and approval before redeployment
governance.audit_trail: Full reasoning trace preserved in incident log
